    Index

    A B C D E F G H I L M N O P R S T U V W 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    A

    A - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserScale
    Smallest scale tier.
    ACCEPTED - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Approved by an admin and assigned to an employee.
    ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserStatus
    Account is approved and usable.
    addButton(String, String, Runnable) - Method in class main.utils.MenuBuilder
    Appends an interactive navigation or operation push button element onto the center grid block stack.
    addButtonRow(JButton...) - Method in class main.utils.FormBuilder
    Appends a trailing horizontal layout panel block containing a series of operation action trigger buttons.
    addField(String, JComponent) - Method in class main.utils.FormBuilder
    Inserts a standard input field into the layout, aligning a description label on the left and the input component on the right.
    addFullWidthRow(JComponent) - Method in class main.utils.FormBuilder
    Adds a component that spans across both columns of the form grid layout.
    addLinkLabel(String, Runnable) - Method in class main.utils.FormBuilder
    Appends an interactive hyper-link style label at the center of the current row layout.
    address - Variable in class main.models.RegistrableUser
     
    address - Variable in class main.models.RegistrableUser.Builder
     
    addRow(JComponent...) - Method in class main.utils.FormBuilder
    Appends a series of arbitrary Swing elements along a single row sequence line.
    Admin - Class in main.models
    Represents an administrative user with elevated system privileges.
    Admin() - Constructor for class main.models.Admin
    Constructs a default Admin instance.
    ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserType
    Administrator: manages users, repairs, parts, and the action log.
    Admin.Builder - Class in main.models
    Builder implementation dedicated to constructing Admin instances.
    AdminMenuState - Class in main.states
     
    AdminMenuState() - Constructor for class main.states.AdminMenuState
     
    AdminUserCreateSelectorState - Class in main.states
     
    AdminUserCreateSelectorState() - Constructor for class main.states.AdminUserCreateSelectorState
     
    App - Class in main
    Entry point of the application.
    App() - Constructor for class main.App
     
    ARCHIVED - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Closed and kept for record-keeping; no further action expected.
    assignEmployee(Repair, Employee) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Assigns an employee to a repair: sets the repair's state to ACCEPTED, relates the employee to the repair, and notifies the employee of the assignment.
    AssignEmployeeState - Class in main.states
     
    AssignEmployeeState(Repair) - Constructor for class main.states.AssignEmployeeState
     

    B

    B - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserScale
    Second smallest scale tier.

    Returns the fully constructed form panel container.
    build() - Method in class main.utils.MenuBuilder
    Compiles and outputs the configured composite panel view hierarchy containing the complete window layout tree structures.

    C

    C - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserScale
    Second largest scale tier.
    Clear - Class in main.utils
    Utility class providing system-level helper routines to clear the console terminal screen across different operating systems.
    Clear() - Constructor for class main.utils.Clear
     
    Client - Class in main.models
    Represents a client account, extending RegistrableUser with commercial metrics such as sector and business scale.
    Client() - Constructor for class main.models.Client
    Constructs a default Client instance.
    CLIENT - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserType
    Client: submits equipment and requests repairs.
    Client.Builder - Class in main.models
    Builder pattern implementation for cleanly generating Client instances.
    ClientMenuState - Class in main.states
     
    ClientMenuState() - Constructor for class main.states.ClientMenuState
     
    close() - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Closes the underlying database connection.
    COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Finished by the assigned employee.
    connect() - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Connects to the SurrealDB server using the connection details stored in the application's properties file, signs in with the configured root credentials, and selects the configured namespace and database.
    content() - Method in record class main.DatabaseManager.NotificationRequest
    Returns the value of the content record component.
    create() - Static method in class main.models.Equipment
    Interactive console workflow that walks a user through creating equipment.
    create() - Static method in class main.models.Part
    Interactively prompts for and creates a new part via the console.

    D

    D - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserScale
    Largest scale tier.
    DatabaseManager - Class in main
    Central access point for all interactions with the SurrealDB database.
    DatabaseManager.DbFunctionCall - Record Class in main
    A single argument call to a server-side SurrealDB validation function, used to check whether a given field value satisfies a DB-defined rule (e.g.
    DatabaseManager.NotificationRequest - Record Class in main
    Describes a notification to be created and delivered to a target, which may be a specific user's RecordId or a broad role such as "ADMIN".
    DatabaseManager.UserCredentials - Record Class in main
    Login credentials supplied by a user attempting to sign in.
    DBConnectionState - Class in main.states
     
    DBConnectionState() - Constructor for class main.states.DBConnectionState
     
    dbFunc() - Method in record class main.DatabaseManager.DbFunctionCall
    Returns the value of the dbFunc record component.
    DbFunctionCall(String, String) - Constructor for record class main.DatabaseManager.DbFunctionCall
    Creates an instance of a DbFunctionCall record class.
    dbValidate(String, JTextField, String) - Method in class main.utils.FormValidator
    Dispatches an interactive database function routine check to validate a text field value server-side.
    defaultConstraints() - Static method in class main.ViewManager
    Generates a default set of GridBagConstraints with predefined padding insets to maintain consistent component spacing across layout grids.
    DetailState<T> - Class in main.states
     
    DetailState() - Constructor for class main.states.DetailState
     
    download(String) - Static method in class main.utils.ImageService
    Downloads an asset token file string from the remote server bucket and decodes it back into an executable window graphics reference.

    E

    edit(Part) - Static method in class main.models.Part
    Interactively prompts for updated values for an existing part via the console, pre-filled with its current values.
    email - Variable in class main.models.User.Builder
     
    email - Variable in class main.models.User
    Personal and authentication fields for the user.
    Email - Class in main.utils
    Orchestrator service class that handles sending system confirmation emails via secure SMTP channels.
    Email() - Constructor for class main.utils.Email
     
    Employee - Class in main.models
    Represents an employee within the system, expanding on RegistrableUser with professional details like specialization and start date.
    Employee() - Constructor for class main.models.Employee
    Constructs a default Employee instance.
    EMPLOYEE - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserType
    Employee: carries out assigned repairs.
    Employee.Builder - Class in main.models
    Builder pattern implementation for creating structured Employee instances.
    EmployeeMenuState - Class in main.states
     
    EmployeeMenuState() - Constructor for class main.states.EmployeeMenuState
     
    enter() - Method in class main.states.State
     
    enter() - Static method in class main.utils.PressKey
    Suspends program flow output and prompts the console listener to wait until the ENTER key is pressed.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class main.DatabaseManager.DbFunctionCall
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class main.DatabaseManager.NotificationRequest
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    equals(Object) - Method in record class main.DatabaseManager.UserCredentials
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    Equipment - Class in main.models
    Tracks physical hardware or assets submitted for maintenance, managing manufacturing timelines, serial codes, and repair tracking fields.
    Equipment() - Constructor for class main.models.Equipment
    Default constructor for DB reflection or manual setup.
    Equipment(String, String, String, ZonedDateTime) - Constructor for class main.models.Equipment
    Creates a new managed equipment instance with an auto-generated SKU.

    FIVE - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserSpecialization

    FormBuilder - Class in main.utils
    Builder utility for creating standardized Swing input forms using structured layout architectures.

    Initiates a new layout form container window model wrapper context.

    Retrieves the equipment submitted by a given user, optionally filtered by a case-insensitive substring match against brand or model, ordered alphabetically by brand.

    Captures a mandatory entry from the console stream, keeping the prompt open until content is valid.

    Captures a terminal console string entry evaluated against a specific database validation rule.
    getInput(String, String, boolean) - Static method in class main.utils.Input
    Interactively updates an existing system record property value, prefilled with a default value fallback option.
    getInput(String, String, String) - Static method in class main.utils.Input
    Overloaded field modifier entry processor executing dual baseline fallback settings and detailed database checks.

    hasAdmin() - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Checks whether at least one active administrator account already exists in the database.

    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    Returns a hash code value for this object.

    Service orchestrator providing integration endpoints for uploading profile attachments and downloading media graphics asynchronously using an external web HTTP API service.
    ImageService() - Constructor for class main.utils.ImageService
     
    IN_PROGRESS - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Accepted by the assigned employee and currently being worked on.
    INACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserStatus
    Account has been deactivated and can no longer sign in.

    isValid() - Method in class main.utils.FormValidator
    Checks if all chained verification checks passed successfully without triggers.

    Assesses basic structural presence ensuring a console field input is not empty.
    isValid(String, String) - Static method in class main.utils.Validator
    Evaluates text values against both mandatory content checks and a dedicated database validator routine.

    M

    main - package main

    Registers a shutdown hook to close the database connection cleanly on exit, then starts the GUI on the Swing event dispatch thread.

    MenuBuilder - Class in main.utils
    UI pattern helper for constructing standardized modular application menu panels with a center grid panel and an optional persistent header for notifications and profile information.
    MenuBuilder() - Constructor for class main.utils.MenuBuilder
    Prepares a standard menu panel assembly with center item anchoring rules.
    MenuBuilder(User) - Constructor for class main.utils.MenuBuilder
    Instantiates an active custom user menu workspace panel including an active top toolbar detailing pending system notification counters.

    PENDING - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus

    PENDING - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserStatus
    Registration submitted and awaiting admin approval.

    PressKey - Class in main.utils
    Utility containing console workflow blockers to pause program execution until explicit user acknowledgement.

    print(String, List, File) - Static method in class main.utils.RepairStatementPrinter
    Generates a PDF document compiling the history log records for a given repair code.
    PropertiesManager - Class in main
    Handles persistent configuration properties for the application, such as database connection credentials and settings stored in an external file.
    PropertiesManager() - Constructor for class main.PropertiesManager
    Constructs a new PropertiesManager and attempts to load configuration settings from the default properties file path.

    R

    refresh() - Method in class main.states.State
     
    regenerateSku() - Method in class main.models.Equipment
    Forces a regeneration of the item's unique SKU barcode identifier.
    RegistrableUser - Class in main.models
    Base class for users who register additional contact/identification details beyond the common User fields — namely Employee and Client.
    RegistrableUser() - Constructor for class main.models.RegistrableUser
     
    RegistrableUser.Builder<T> - Class in main.models
    Base builder for RegistrableUser subclasses, adding the registrable-specific fields (NIF, phone, address) on top of User.Builder.
    REJECTED - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.UserStatus
    Registration was reviewed and rejected by an admin.
    REJECTED_BY_ADMIN - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Rejected by an admin before assignment.
    REJECTED_BY_EMPLOYEE - Enum constant in enum class main.enums.RepairStatus
    Rejected by the assigned employee after being accepted by an admin.

    Repair - Class in main.models
    Tracks an individual technical maintenance job lifecycle, documenting cost metrics, scheduling milestones, and diagnostic details.

    Default constructor for instances of Repair jobs.

    RepairStatementPrinter - Class in main.utils
    Utility class for exporting historical repair milestones and log events into a formatted PDF statement using Apache PDFBox.
    RepairStatementPrinter() - Constructor for class main.utils.RepairStatementPrinter
     
    RepairStatus - Enum Class in main.enums
    Represents the lifecycle states a repair request can be in, from initial client submission through to completion or rejection at any stage.
    require(String, JPasswordField) - Method in class main.utils.FormValidator
    Mandates that a password entry box cannot be empty.
    require(String, JTextField) - Method in class main.utils.FormValidator
    Mandates that a text component must contain non-blank character values.

    S

    saveEquipment(Equipment, User) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Persists a new piece of equipment and relates it to the client who submitted it, within a single transaction.
    saveFile() - Method in class main.PropertiesManager
    Saves the current internal properties state back to the configuration file on disk.
    savePart(Part) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Persists a new part to the database.
    saveRepair(Equipment, User) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Creates a new repair request for the given equipment on behalf of the given client, relating both, then notifies all admins of the new request.
    saveUser(User) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Persists a new user to the database.

    Clears the current command-line terminal window.

    toMap(Client) - Static method in class main.models.Client
    Maps client-specific attributes for database operations.
    toMap(Employee) - Static method in class main.models.Employee
    Maps employee-specific fields for SurrealDB operations.
    toMap(Equipment) - Static method in class main.models.Equipment
    Converts equipment data into a structured format for storage queries.
    toMap(RegistrableUser) - Static method in class main.models.RegistrableUser
    Converts a registrable user's registrable-specific fields into a map suitable for use as the CONTENT/MERGE payload of a registrable_user table query.
    toMap(User) - Static method in class main.models.User
    Converts the core user fields into a map format compatible with SurrealDB payloads.

    U

    updatePart(Part) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Persists changes to an existing part by merging the given object's fields into the stored record.
    updateRepairState(Repair, String, String, Double) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Updates a repair's state, optionally recording a rejection reason or a final cost, and notifies the relevant party (the client, or all admins if an employee rejected the repair) of the change.
    updateUser(User) - Method in class main.DatabaseManager
    Persists changes to an existing user's data, including any type-specific fields (employee/client) and registrable-user fields, within a single transaction.
    upload(File) - Static method in class main.utils.ImageService
    Dispatches a local file via standard multipart/form-data encoding to a cloud host storage bucket endpoint.
    user - Static variable in class main.states.State
     
    User - Class in main.models
    Abstract base class representing a generic user in the system.

    Abstract builder pattern implementation to support fluent inheritance across different user sub-types.

    UserScale - Enum Class in main.enums
    Represents the size/scale tier of a client organization, used to categorize clients for business purposes (e.g.
    UserSpecialization - Enum Class in main.enums
    Represents an employee's specialization level, stored and displayed as a numeric string from 1 (lowest) to 5 (highest).
    UserStatus - Enum Class in main.enums
    Represents the account status of a user, controlling whether they are able to sign in and use the system.
    UserType - Enum Class in main.enums
    Represents the role a user account has within the system, determining which menus and actions are available to them.

    V

    Validates a single field's value against a server-side SurrealDB validation function.
